title: Marking Activities as "done" within the item it came from, not just on the Activities page
excerpt: if working in a Lead i notice that i have an activity, i cannot see if it was actually “done” unless i go to the “Activities” page and search for it. Not all activities are done on time and it would be nice while within …

posts.author: s.churby (sandi churby)
posts.cookedHtml: if working in a Lead i notice that i have an activity, i cannot see if it was actually “done” unless i go to the “Activities” page and search for it. Not all activities are done on time and it would be nice while within the Lead or Account I can scroll and see which activities have been done or if there are any that may have been missed and still marked as “open”

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @s.churby ,
welcome to the community.
You can add multiple filtered views in the list to display tasks based on their status, such as showing only tasks marked as “Done” or those currently in “Open” status.

Zaki
Business Workflow Consultant
Ready Logic
